mapper.sql: psi.id, psi.user_id, psi.title, psi.description, psi.kind, psi.status, psi.all_day, psi.timing_precision, psi.start_at, psi.end_at, psi.timezone, psi.application_case_id, psi.fit_analysis_id, psi.source_type, psi.source_ref, psi.source_snapshot_json, psi.overlay_visible, psi.opacity, psi.pinned, psi.click_through, psi.created_at, psi.updated_at, ac.company_name AS application_company_name, ac.job_title AS application_job_title, ac.deadline_date AS application_deadline_date, fa.fit_score
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM planner_memo WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY pinned DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO planner_memo (user_id, title, content, color, pinned, overlay_visible, opacity, application_case_id, fit_analysis_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{color}, #{pinned}, #{overlayVisible}, #{opacity}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{fitAnalysisId})
mapper.update: UPDATE planner_memo SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, color = #{color}, pinned = #{pinned}, overlay_visible = #{overlayVisible}, opacity = #{opacity}, application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId}, fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM planner_schedule_item psi LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = psi.application_case_id LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = psi.fit_analysis_id WHERE psi.user_id = #{userId} AND psi.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (psi.end_at IS NULL OR psi.end_at >= #{from})
AND (psi.start_at IS NULL OR psi.start_at <= #{to})
ORDER BY psi.pinned DESC, psi.start_at IS NULL, psi.start_at ASC, psi.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM planner_schedule_item psi LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = psi.application_case_id LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = psi.fit_analysis_id WHERE psi.id = #{itemId} AND psi.user_id = #{userId} AND psi.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM planner_schedule_reminder psr INNER JOIN planner_schedule_item psi ON psi.id = psr.schedule_item_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = psi.application_case_id LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = psi.fit_analysis_id WHERE psr.id = #{reminderId} AND psi.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO planner_schedule_item (user_id, title, description, kind, status, all_day, timing_precision, start_at, end_at, timezone, application_case_id, fit_analysis_id, source_type, source_ref, source_snapshot_json, overlay_visible, opacity, pinned, click_through) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{kind}, #{status}, #{allDay}, #{timingPrecision}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{timezone}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{fitAnalysisId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRef}, #{sourceSnapshotJson}, #{overlayVisible}, #{opacity}, #{pinned}, #{clickThrough})
mapper.update: UPDATE planner_schedule_item SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, kind = #{kind}, status = #{status}, all_day = #{allDay}, timing_precision = #{timingPrecision}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, timezone = #{timezone}, application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId}, fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_ref = #{sourceRef}, source_snapshot_json = #{sourceSnapshotJson}, overlay_visible = #{overlayVisible}, opacity = #{opacity}, pinned = #{pinned}, click_through = #{clickThrough} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT psr.* FROM planner_schedule_reminder psr INNER JOIN planner_schedule_item psi ON psi.id = psr.schedule_item_id WHERE psr.status = 'PENDING' AND psr.remind_at IS NOT NULL AND psr.remind_at <= #{now} AND psi.deleted_at IS NULL AND psi.status != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY psr.remind_at ASC, psr.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO planner_schedule_reminder (schedule_item_id, remind_at, offset_minutes, channels_json, sound_enabled, vibration_enabled, status) VALUES (#{scheduleItemId}, #{remindAt}, #{offsetMinutes}, #{channelsJson}, #{soundEnabled}, #{vibrationEnabled}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE planner_schedule_reminder SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{reminderId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT fa.id AS fit_analysis_id, ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id ) AS latest_fit_analysis_id, fa.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.deadline_date, fa.fit_score, fa.strategy, fa.recommended_study, fa.recommended_certificates, fa.strategy_actions, fa.gap_recommendations, fa.certificate_recommendations, fa.created_at AS analysis_created_at, ac.updated_at AS application_updated_at FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE fa.id = #{fitAnalysisId} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL
